---
title: "7.5-testing (Imputed Values)"
author: "Justin Guerra"
date: "2026-05-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# =============================
# 0. Libraries
# =============================
library(magrittr)
library(here) 
library(glmnet)
library(dplyr)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(properties)
library(ResourceSelection)
library(rms)   # <-- ADDED

# =============================
# 1. Load helper functions
# =============================
source('C:/Users/justi/OneDrive/Desktop/Malnutrition_Project/infant_malnutrition_stratification/mdl-evaluation.R')

# =============================
# 2. Paths
# =============================
prop <- read.properties("C:/Users/justi/OneDrive/Desktop/Malnutrition_Project/infant_malnutrition_stratification/data.properties")
data_folder <- prop$data_folder
output_folder <- prop$output_folder

base_imp_path <- "C:/Users/justi/OneDrive/Desktop/feature-selection/min_node_size_2/"

# =============================
# 3. Helper
# =============================
calc_log_odds <- function(probs) {
  log(probs / (1 - probs))
}

# =============================
# 4. Loop over actual folders
# =============================
imp_folders <- list.dirs(base_imp_path, full.names = TRUE, recursive = FALSE)

for (mdl_folder in imp_folders) {
  
  folder_name <- basename(mdl_folder)
  
  cat("\n=============================\n")
  cat("Processing", folder_name, "\n")
  cat("=============================\n")
  
  # -----------------------------
  # Load data
  # -----------------------------
  load(file = file.path(mdl_folder, "train_model.rda"))
  load(file = file.path(mdl_folder, "test_predictors.rda"))
  load(file = file.path(mdl_folder, "test_response.rda"))
  
  selected_features <- readLines(file.path(mdl_folder, "sel_predictor_names.txt"))
  
  # -----------------------------
  # Prediction pipeline
  # -----------------------------
  selected_test_predictors <- test_predictors[, selected_features, drop = FALSE]
  
  test_predictions <- predict(train_model, newx = selected_test_predictors, type = "response")
  test_probs <- as.numeric(test_predictions[, 1])
  
  test_log_odds <- calc_log_odds(test_probs)
  
  test_data <- data.frame(
    out = test_response,
    logodds = test_log_odds,
    prob = test_probs
  )
  
  # -----------------------------
  # Output directory
  # -----------------------------
  out_dir <- file.path(mdl_folder, "evaluation")
  dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  
  # =============================
  # 5. Calibration + ROC
  # =============================
  cal_plot(
    model = NULL,
    test_data,
    "prob",
    model_label = folder_name,
    dir = out_dir,
    fn = paste0("cal_plot_", folder_name, ".pdf")
  )
  
  cal_c0 <- cal_coeff(
    test_data,
    "prob",
    out_dir,
    paste0("cal_plot_coefficients_", folder_name, ".txt")
  )
  
  print(cal_c0)
  
  # =============================
  # 5b. Brier Score + Calibration (PROPER)
  # =============================
  val <- rms::val.prob(test_probs, test_response, m = 10)
  
  brier <- val["Brier"]
  cal_intercept <- val["Intercept"]
  cal_slope <- val["Slope"]
  
  cat("\n--- Proper Calibration Metrics ---\n")
  cat("Brier Score:", brier, "\n")
  cat("Calibration Intercept:", cal_intercept, "\n")
  cat("Calibration Slope:", cal_slope, "\n")
  
  # Save to file
  sink(file.path(out_dir, paste0("calibration_metrics_", folder_name, ".txt")))
  cat("Brier Score:", brier, "\n")
  cat("Calibration Intercept:", cal_intercept, "\n")
  cat("Calibration Slope:", cal_slope, "\n")
  sink()
  
  # =============================
  # 5c. ROC Curve
  # =============================
  roc_plot(
    test_response,
    test_probs,
    dir = out_dir,
    fn = paste0("roc_plot_", folder_name, ".pdf")
  )
  
  # =============================
  # 6. ROC performance
  # =============================
  plot_roc_perf(test_data$out, test_data$prob)
  
  # =============================
  # 7. Confusion matrix
  # =============================
  conf_matrix(
    test_data$out,
    test_data$prob,
    0.5,
    out_dir,
    paste0("conf_matrix_", folder_name, ".txt")
  )
  
  # =============================
  # 8. Hosmer-Lemeshow test
  # =============================
  hosmerlem <- hoslem.test(test_response, test_probs, g = 10)
  
  hl_table <- data.frame(
    Group = 1:10,
    Observed = hosmerlem$observed[, 2],
    Expected = hosmerlem$expected[, 2],
    Observed_Positive = hosmerlem$observed[, 2],
    Expected_Positive = hosmerlem$expected[, 2]
  )
  
  hl_table$Observed_Percentage <- (hl_table$Observed_Positive / sum(hl_table$Observed_Positive)) * 100
  hl_table$Expected_Percentage <- (hl_table$Expected_Positive / sum(hl_table$Expected_Positive)) * 100
  
  print(hl_table)
  
  write.csv(
    hl_table,
    file = file.path(out_dir, paste0("hl_table_", folder_name, ".csv")),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}
```
